title: Pin Go to 1.18
body:
1.19 has changed the expected gofmt format, and we don't want to follow such changes on the stable branch.

`go@1.18` is "keg-only", i.e. not installed by Brew to `/usr/local/bin`, so we need to change `PATH` to point at it (as the installation instructs us to).

---

This is based on commit 1b6d7f79a521bdcf5947f14363211d3d3ca92c99 from the 1.4 branch.
